event_type.Description: Type of behavioral event in the virtual foraging task

Levels.reward_site_enter: The time when the mouse enters a virtual location where rewards are potentially available.
Levels.reward_site_exit: The time when the mouse exits a virtual location where rewards are potentially available.
Levels.odor_onset: The onset of the odor that is presented for every reward site.
Levels.odor_offset: The offset of the odor that is presented for every reward site.
Levels.reward: Water reward that motivates mice to run down the virtual environment.
Levels.lick: Time when mouse licks the lick spout.
Levels.tone: Auditory cue that indicates to the mouse that it has fulfilled the stop criteria to collect potential rewards.
Levels.patch_enter: Time when the mouse enters the virtual location of a new patch.
Levels.patch_exit: Time when the mouse exits the virtual location of a new patch.
Levels.block_onset: Time block when experimental statistics in the session is changed.
Levels.block_offset: The offset of the time block when experimental statistics in the session were changed.
Levels.inter_site_enter: Time when the mouse enters the virtual location of an inter-site (between reward sites).
Levels.inter_site_exit: Time when the mouse exits the virtual location of an inter-site (between reward sites).
Levels.inter_patch_enter: Time when the mouse enters the virtual location of an inter-patch (between patches).
Levels.inter_patch_exit: Time when the mouse exits the virtual location of an inter-patch (between patches).
Levels.reward_probability: The probability of reward when the reward curve is sampled by the task logic (mouse stops, waits, etc.) to decide whether a reward will be delivered or not.
Levels.stop_onset: When the velocity of the mouse slows to the stop threshold of velocity.
Levels.stop_offset: When the velocity of the mouse exceeds the stop threshold.

site_index.Description: Index identifier of the reward site in the virtual environment

patch_index.Description: Index identifier of the patch in the virtual environment

block_index.Description: Integer identifier of the experimental block within the session

odor_id.Description: Identifier of the odor stimulus presented at the reward site

concentration.Description: Concentration level of the odor stimulus presented at the reward site

reward_volume.Description: Volume of water reward delivered to the mouse upon a correct response
